description: Recommended KOSIS MCP tool exposure for Gemma chatbot integrations. Prefer transparent data/materials over forced final-answer control.
rules: Use answer_query for simple natural-language lookups; use plan_query for composite, multi-metric, ambiguous, or high-stakes statistical questions.
Do not present plan_query output as a final answer.
For analysis tools, use input arrays, must_know, data_characteristics, model_options, and common_pitfalls before choosing an interpretation.
Use metrics, quarantined_metrics, conflict_decisions, semantic_dimensions, and table_required_dimensions to decide follow-up calls.
Do not infer missing KOSIS values from model knowledge.
Report unsupported, missing, or low-coverage metrics explicitly.
